{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>Bey Herrn Johannes Christ seel. Frau Wittib ist zu haben: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Johann Arnds</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Passions- und Oster-Predigten</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT> à <PRICE>fl. 2.</PRICE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Predigten von denen Egyptischen Plagen</TITLE>, <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT> à <PRICE>24. kr.</PRICE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Stahlii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Fundamenta Chymiae dogmat. rat. & experim.</TITLE> <VOLUME>Pars II.</VOLUME>, <FORMAT>4to.</FORMAT> <PRICE>fl. 1. 30. kr.</PRICE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Poetevin</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Nouvelle Grammaire Francoise & Allemande</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> à <PRICE>32. kr.</PRICE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Maiers der Geistl.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Krancken Geistl. oder Seelen-Cur.</TITLE>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> à <PRICE>48. kr.</PRICE></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ejusd.</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Hauß-Gebett-Buch, mit grober Schrifft</TITLE>, <VOLUME>2. Theile</VOLUME>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> à <PRICE>40. kr.</PRICE></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":12,"explanation":"The following corrections were made:
1. `√ü` → `ss` in "Passions-" (OCR artifact in TITLE of first BIBL).
2. `√†` → `à` (price separator symbol, OCR artifact) in BIBL 1 — and consistently across all BIBLs (fixes 2–6 for BIBLs 1, 2, 4, 5, 6).
3. All `<PRIZE>` closing tags corrected to `<PRICE>` to match the opening tag `<PRICE>` (or vice versa) — specifically: BIBLs 1, 2, 4, 5, 6 used `<PRIZE>` for both open and close (tag name standardised to `<PRICE>`), and BIBL 3 had a mismatched `<PRICE>` open / `</PRIZE>` close tag (fix 7).
4. `Stahiii` → `Stahlii` (OCR error: 'iii' instead of 'lii') in AUTHOR of BIBL 3 (fix 8).
5. `Nouvelie` → `Nouvelle` (OCR error) in TITLE of BIBL 4 (fix 9).
6. `√ü` → `ß` in "Hauß-" (OCR artifact in TITLE of BIBL 6) (fix 10).
7. `&` → `&` in BIBL 3 and BIBL 4 TITLE fields to produce well-formed XML (fixes 11–12)."}

Theile</VOLUME>, <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT> à <PRICE>40. kr.</PRICE></BIBL></ITEM>
parsed.explanation:
The following corrections were made:
1. `√ü` → `ss` in "Passions-" (OCR artifact in TITLE of first BIBL).
2. `√†` → `à` (price separator symbol, OCR artifact) in BIBL 1 — and consistently across all BIBLs (fixes 2–6 for BIBLs 1, 2, 4, 5, 6).
3. All `<PRIZE>` closing tags corrected to `<PRICE>` to match the opening tag `<PRICE>` (or vice versa) — specifically: BIBLs 1, 2, 4, 5, 6 used `<PRIZE>` for both open and close (tag name standardised to `<PRICE>`), and BIBL 3 had a mismatched `<PRICE>` open / `</PRIZE>` close tag (fix 7).
4. `Stahiii` → `Stahlii` (OCR error: 'iii' instead of 'lii') in AUTHOR of BIBL 3 (fix 8).
5. `Nouvelie` → `Nouvelle` (OCR error) in TITLE of BIBL 4 (fix 9).
6. `√ü` → `ß` in "Hauß-" (OCR artifact in TITLE of BIBL 6) (fix 10).
7. `&` → `&` in BIBL 3 and BIBL 4 TITLE fields to produce well-formed XML (fixes 11–12).
